message:
fix(cass,tracking): Use warn() utility for consistent logging

Replace console.error() calls with warn() utility to respect
verbose/quiet settings and provide consistent log formatting:

cass.ts:
- cassAvailable spawn/status/exception logging

tracking.ts:
- trackEvent failure logging
- ProcessedLog load error logging
